title: Smoky Mediterranean Vine Leaves Stir-fry
description: A paleo-friendly, smoky and creamy dish featuring vine leaves that are slow-cooked to perfection.
instructions: Rinse vine leaves under cold water and drain. Pat dry with paper towels.
Spread palm hearts on a baking sheet and drizzle with olive oil. Season with salt, pepper, and smoked paprika.
Place the vine leaves over the palm hearts in a single layer. Drizzle more olive oil over them lightly to prevent sticking.
Bake for about 15-20 minutes until they are crispy on top but still tender inside. Remove from oven and let cool slightly.
In a large pan, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic and cook for about 30 seconds until fragrant. Stir in lemon juice and dill (if using).
Gently fold the cooled vine leaves into the sauce and stir to coat evenly. Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with a sprinkle of fresh herbs if desired.
